title: Device Home Screen - Device Connected and up to date
scenario: Verify that the "i" icon is visible on the Device Home Screen for unencrypted devices or devices with limited support.
steps: 2. Observe the device name displayed on the screen.
3. Check if the device is unencrypted or has limited support.
4. If the device is unencrypted or has limited support, verify that an "i" icon is visible next to the device name.
5. Verify that a green dot and "Connected" label are displayed.
6. Verify that the device image is shown.
7. If quick settings are enabled, verify they are displayed.
8. Verify that the "..." button is present.
9. Verify that battery icons are displayed.
10. Verify that the version number is displayed.
expected: The Device Home Screen displays: Device Name (with "i" icon if applicable), green dot and "Connected" label, device image, quick settings (if enabled), "..." button, battery icons, and version number.
